rationale: Lens: does Bead 3 get what it needs from this field, ergonomically? Yes. panel.go adds `Gate string \`json:"gate,omitempty\`" exactly as plan §Bead 3 Step 1 expects to read (`panelReg.Panel.Gate`); `Panel.IsBead()` is pre-existing and untouched by this diff, so `panelReg.Panel.IsBead()` still works. I compiled a scratch test wiring the exact anticipated call, `cfg.PanelGateAdvisoryDefault(reg.Panel.Gate, reg.Panel.IsBead())`, against Bead 1's already-landed `PanelGateAdvisoryDefault(recordedGate string, isBead bool) (int, bool)` (internal/config/config.go:832) plus this bead's new field/method combo (internal/config/zzz_s3_scratch_test.go, removed after; `go test` PASS, `git status` clean after) -- the three pieces compose with zero adapter code, matching the plan's step-1 call shape verbatim. Cross-checked spec-110's plan (worktree-spec-110-panel-verbs-parser-parity, plan.md:998-1004): it explicitly anticipates this exact field shape (string, omitempty, decision-inert, additive) for its future `panel.Create` writer and confirms zero required changes whether or not `gate` is stamped yet -- this diff matches that expectation exactly. ADR-0037 §1 amendment and workflow/architecture.md doc-sync both give Bead 3's own doc-sync (interfaces.md step 7) accurate prior art to extend. No gap found for next-bead integration.
findings: Panel.Gate (internal/panel/panel.go) is exported string with json:"gate,omitempty", matching plan §Bead 3 Step 1's `panelReg.Panel.Gate` read exactly.
Panel.IsBead() (internal/panel/panel.go:153) is pre-existing and untouched by this commit's diff -- Bead 3's `panelReg.Panel.IsBead()` call is unaffected.

internal/config.PanelGateAdvisoryDefault(recordedGate string, isBead bool) (int, bool) (already landed in Bead 1, config.go:832) type-matches Gate/IsBead() with no glue code; verified by a scratch compile+test (removed, git status clean after).

spec-110's plan (plan.md:998-1004) independently pins the same field shape (string, omitempty, decision-inert, additive) for its future panel.Create writer and states its writer needs zero changes regardless of stamping timing -- consistent with this bead's contract.
ADR-0037 §1 amendment and workflow/architecture.md doc-sync correctly describe the field for Bead 3's interfaces.md doc-sync to build on.
